reviews.comment:
Bien muy bien  muy muy budna atencion  solo falta que vuela la confiteria

(Translated by Google)
Very good, excellent service, the only thing missing is for the confectionery to fly off the shelves.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, lástima que cerraron el Área de Serviclub hace mas de 2 años por reformas y nunca más lo abrieron, o sea, no hay donde desayunar o comprar otras cosas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's a shame they closed the Serviclub area more than two years ago for renovations and never reopened it. That means there's no place to have breakfast or buy other things.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, la estación de servicio es muy grande, con varias islas de surtidores, tiene buenos baños y la atención de los playeros/así es muy cordial, lo malo es lo que sé tarda en cobrar a cada cliente, entre la tarjeta y los descuentos a los socios se hace bastante tedioso, y también lamentablemente no está más el minimercado con confitería y comidas, que estaba muy bueno, una pena por qué era asiduo concurrente al local, espero vuelvan a abrir por los trabajadores y los clientes

(Translated by Google)
Good service, the service station is very large, with several pump islands, it has good bathrooms and the service of the attendants is very friendly, the bad thing is how long it takes to charge each customer, between the card and the discounts for members it gets quite tedious, and also unfortunately the minimarket with candy and food is no longer there, which was very good, a shame because I was a regular visitor to the place, I hope they reopen for the workers and customers
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMkoteElREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención. Pero muchas islas cerradas. Eso demora un poco la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good. However, many fuel pumps were closed, which slowed down refueling.
